title: Pelecyphora hesteri
taxonomy: Pelecyphora hesteri is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is native to Mexico, specifically in the states of Coahuila and Chihuahua. Pelecyphora hesteri belongs to the genus Pelecyphora, which is part of the subfamily Cactoideae. The subfamily Cactoideae is a group of cacti that are characterized by their stems, which can be spherical, cylindrical, or columnar in shape. Pelecyphora hesteri is a unique species within this group due to its distinctive appearance and growth habits.
